_comment: MT-061 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: character identity + sheet parsing/versioning. Pure JSON, no SQLite. public_id_slug is made run-unique by the loader; raw_text carries exact bytes (including whitespace) that the sheet parser must preserve.

sheet_versions.raw_text:
CHARACTER TEMPLATE (v2.00)
IDENTITY
CHAR-ID-002 — Name: <string|protected>
CHAR-ID-003 — Alias: <string|editable:sheet-curator>
  Freeform note that must survive guarded edits
sheet_versions.author: fixture-loader

sheet_versions.raw_text:
CHARACTER TEMPLATE (v2.00)
IDENTITY
CHAR-ID-002 — Name: <Mentor Subject>
CHAR-ID-003 — Alias: <The Guide>
  Freeform note that must survive guarded edits
sheet_versions.author: fixture-loader

sheet_versions.raw_text:
CHARACTER TEMPLATE (v2.00)
IDENTITY
CHAR-ID-002 — Name: <string>
CHAR-ID-003 — Alias: <string>
sheet_versions.author: fixture-loader
